temporal_description: A medium shot captures a woman standing in a dimly lit room with wood-paneled walls. The audio is filled with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. She has dark hair pulled back and is wearing a white top under a brown jacket. She holds a white cordless phone to her ear, her expression serious and focused. The room is sparsely decorated, with a poster of a landscape on the wall behind her and a larger, framed poster of a political or historical figure to her right. A circular, porthole-like object is visible on the wall to her left. The camera remains static, keeping the woman as the central focus. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a pensive and slightly sorrowful atmosphere. The music is continuous and atmospheric, evoking a sense of quiet contemplation and a touch of sadness, without any dialogue or sound effects to interrupt its flow. The scene cuts to a wide shot of a city street at night. In the distance, the illuminated spires of a grand, traditional-style building, possibly a temple, dominate the view. The street is dark and appears empty, with buildings lining both sides. A few streetlights cast a cool, blueish light on the scene. The camera is stationary, presenting a still, atmospheric view of the urban landscape. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper right corner of the frame.
